_comment: Preloaded tool-definition budget for the deferred tool surface (T.1), enforced by checks.py::check_tool_surface_deferred. Peer of suite_baseline.json and governed identically: this file is in agent-settings.json's deny-list so a sprint CANNOT raise its own ceiling, and the ratchet runs DOWN only - a human-promoted commit may lower it, nothing may raise it. NOTE the difference from suite_baseline: that file records an OBSERVED floor, this one declares a REQUIRED ceiling. It is therefore set in advance by ruling, not derived from measurement, which is why T.0 -> T.1 needs no human promotion step. T.0's measured number lands in harness/notes/token_baseline.json and is the BEFORE; this is the AFTER the sprint must reach.
rationale: Three in-context verbs (tool_search / tool_describe / tool_execute) with descriptions good enough to route 115 tools. Calibrated against published 2026 implementations: Cloudflare Code Mode reaches 2,500+ endpoints through 2 tools in ~1,000 tokens; Speakeasy's search/describe/execute triad reports up to 160x reduction. 2,000 leaves headroom for Houdini-specific routing hints in the search description without drifting back toward a catalog.
